content.sentence: Tôi sẽ ___ bạn nên làm gì.

translation.en: I will advise you on what to do.

notes_md:
**khuyên** = to advise, to suggest what someone should do because you think it’s good for them.

It’s a verb, usually followed by a person and an action. You often use it when giving caring, thoughtful advice.  

It’s softer than *ra lệnh* (to order) and more personal than *tư vấn* (to consult/give professional advice).  
Related word: *khuyên bảo* = to advise repeatedly or more seriously.

translation.en: I will advise you on what to do.

content.sentence: Tôi sẽ ___ bạn nên làm gì.

notes:
khuyên = to advise, to suggest what someone should do because you think it’s good for them.

It’s a verb, usually followed by a person and an action. You often use it when giving caring, thoughtful advice.  

It’s softer than ra lệnh (to order) and more personal than tư vấn (to consult/give professional advice).  
Related word: khuyên bảo = to advise repeatedly or more seriously.
exampleSentencesTranslated: The doctor advise him to exercise regularly to stay healthy.
She often advise me to study hard to get good results.
Friends always advise me to think positively when facing difficulties.
exampleSentences: Bác sĩ đã khuyên anh nên tập thể dục thường xuyên để khỏe mạnh.
Chị thường khuyên em học tập chăm chỉ để đạt kết quả tốt.
Bạn bè luôn khuyên tôi nên suy nghĩ tích cực khi gặp khó khăn.

definitions.vi: Khuyên là hành động đưa ra lời khuyên hoặc đề nghị cho ai đó làm điều gì đó.
definitions.es: Aconsejar o recomendar a alguien hacer algo.
definitions.en: To advise or recommend someone to do something.

example.en: I advise you to study hard.
example.vi: Tôi khuyên bạn nên học chăm chỉ.
